Modules

🌟 The Fool's Leap 🎭 Archetypes of the Soul 🔥 The Four Sacred Suits 👑 The Royal Court 🔮 Weaving the Web ⚡ The Fearless Reader 💫 Reading for Others
Card of the Day Worksheets Progress Bingo

✦ Deepen Your Practice ✦

Worksheets & Journals

Ten guided worksheets to support your tarot learning journey. Use these for self-reflection, journaling, or group discussion.

🌟

Module 1 Worksheet

My Tarot Origin Story

Explore what brought you to tarot, your hopes and intentions for this journey, and the wisdom you already carry.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    What first drew you to tarot?

  • 2.

    What do you hope to learn or gain from this course?

  • 3.

    How do you feel about using intuition as a tool for insight?

  • 4.

    Describe a time your intuition guided you well.

  • 5.

    What fears or doubts do you have about learning tarot?

For personal use & journaling
🗺️

Module 2 Worksheet

My Fool's Journey Map

Chart your personal life journey through the lens of the 22 Major Arcana archetypes.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Which Major Arcana card best represents where you are RIGHT NOW in life?

  • 2.

    Which card represents a recent challenge you overcame?

  • 3.

    Which archetype do you most aspire to embody?

  • 4.

    Which archetype feels most foreign or challenging to you?

  • 5.

    Draw your own 'Fool's Journey' with 5 cards that tell your recent life story.

For personal use & journaling
🪞

Module 2 Worksheet

Archetype Mirror

Explore how each of the 22 Major Arcana archetypes shows up in your personal life and relationships.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Choose one Major Arcana card. How does this archetype show up in your daily life?

  • 2.

    Which archetype do people closest to you embody?

  • 3.

    What archetype are you currently being called to integrate?

  • 4.

    Describe a situation where you embodied the Magician (using your resources).

  • 5.

    Where in your life do you need more High Priestess energy (quiet inner knowing)?

For personal use & journaling
🔥

Module 3 Worksheet

Elemental Self-Assessment

Discover your elemental balance across Fire (Wands), Water (Cups), Air (Swords), and Earth (Pentacles).

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Rate each element in your life 1-10: Fire (passion/creativity), Water (emotions), Air (thoughts/communication), Earth (material/body).

  • 2.

    Which element do you feel most comfortable with?

  • 3.

    Which element do you most need to cultivate?

  • 4.

    How does each element show up in your work, relationships, and inner life?

  • 5.

    Pull one card from each suit. What does this 4-card spread tell you about your current elemental balance?

For personal use & journaling
⚖️

Module 3 Worksheet

Suit Balance Check-In

A monthly check-in worksheet to see which suit energies are dominant or missing from your life.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Shuffle and draw 4 cards—one for each suit energy present in your life this month.

  • 2.

    Which suit is most active in your current situation?

  • 3.

    Which suit feels blocked or missing?

  • 4.

    What would bringing more balance to your elemental energies look like?

  • 5.

    Set one intention for each element for the coming month.

For personal use & journaling
👑

Module 4 Worksheet

My Court Card Profile

Identify which court card archetypes you embody in different areas of your life.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Which court card most represents your public persona?

  • 2.

    Which court card best reflects your inner emotional world?

  • 3.

    Which court card do you embody at work vs. in relationships?

  • 4.

    Which court card do you aspire to become?

  • 5.

    Which court card triggers or challenges you, and why?

For personal use & journaling
🔮

Module 5 Worksheet

My Personal Spread Creation

Design your own tarot spread to answer a question or explore an area of your life.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    What question or life area do you want to explore?

  • 2.

    How many cards do you want in your spread (3-7 recommended)?

  • 3.

    Name each position and what aspect of your question it addresses.

  • 4.

    Draw your spread layout here (sketch the positions).

  • 5.

    Perform the reading and journal the story the cards tell together.

For personal use & journaling
⚡

Module 6 Worksheet

Intuition Trust Journal

A journal for tracking and validating your intuitive impressions to build confidence in your inner voice.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    Pull a card without looking up its meaning. What is your first intuitive impression?

  • 2.

    After journaling your impression, look up the traditional meaning. What matches?

  • 3.

    What symbols caught your eye first, and what do THEY mean to you personally?

  • 4.

    Describe a time your tarot intuition proved accurate or insightful.

  • 5.

    What does 'trusting your intuition' feel like in your body?

For personal use & journaling
📜

Module 6 Worksheet

My Reading Style Declaration

Declare your unique approach to tarot reading and the values that will guide your practice.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    How do I approach reversed cards in my readings?

  • 2.

    What is my reading philosophy (predictive, empowerment-based, psychological...)?

  • 3.

    What boundaries do I hold in my reading practice?

  • 4.

    How do I want people to FEEL after receiving a reading from me?

  • 5.

    Write your personal Reading Style Declaration in 3-5 sentences.

For personal use & journaling
💫

Module 7 Worksheet

Reading for Others Reflection

Reflect on your experience of reading tarot for others and refine your ethical approach.

▶ View Journal Prompts
  • 1.

    How did it feel to read for someone else for the first time?

  • 2.

    What ethical guidelines feel most important to you as a reader?

  • 3.

    How do you handle it when someone receives a challenging card?

  • 4.

    What boundaries do you need to maintain to read sustainably?

  • 5.

    Write a 3-sentence ethics statement for your tarot practice.

For personal use & journaling

🌙 How to Use These Worksheets

These worksheets are designed to be used alongside each module. You can write directly in your journal, print them out, or use them as discussion guides in a group setting. There are no wrong answers — only your authentic responses.

✦ The Fearless Tarot ✦

A mystical journey through the 78 cards of wisdom. Trust your intuition, embrace the archetypes, and read fearlessly.

Tarot is a tool for self-reflection, not fortune-telling. Trust your own intuition always.
